narrative: US-Iran fire exchange and ceasefire tests introduce a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY holds at 156.87 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; gold higher +0.20% near $4,720; equities -0.38%; DXY +0.14%; VIX 17.1. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (1.180% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as NZD (+0.581% avg) outperforms CAD (-0.599% avg) on RBNZ hike bias. Watch US NFP at 12:30 UTC for the next macro catalyst.
